Subject: Urgent: Verify Your Account Details to Prevent Unauthorized Access

Body:

Dear Valued Customer,

We want to ensure the security of your account. As part of our routine security checks, we noticed an unusual activity on our system. To prevent any potential unauthorized access, we are requesting you to verify your account details.

Please take a moment to confirm your account information. This is a critical step in maintaining the integrity of your account.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]  
Customer Support Team  

P.S. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us at support@banksecurity.com. We are here to ensure your account remains secure.
